programme.desc: Two ministers in Liverpool take over an old church with a plan to turn it into a community centre, only to be obstructed by a group of squatters who refuse to leave. Time to call in eviction expert Chris Sharpe. Council officers Shital and Andrew are on the warpath when a neglectful landlord ignores their warnings about fire safety. Northamptonshire landlord Sina visits her property to ask why payments had stopped, only to be faced by an angry and volatile tenant, leaving her scared to return

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In Bristol, eviction lawyer Chris deals with a complex case in which squatters have broken into an empty pub and are now refusing to leave, with landlord Alex wanting them out as he is awaiting planning permission to turn the pub into flats. Jill is trying to regain a property she and her late husband bought as an investment, which she has been renting out to alleviate financial stress

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: An edition catching up with previous cases. Owed thousands in rent, landlord Matthew decided to evict his tenant, and called on an eviction specialist for help. As the tenant lived with seven cats, Matthew was worried about the state of the property, but that turned out to be the least of his problems. Cameras catch up with Matthew to see if he turned his property around. Having found a buyer for his house, Kirk asked the sitting tenant to leave. However, on the day of the move, she refused, stopped paying rent and Kirk's sale fell through. Kirk had to evict his nightmare tenant before he lost the house. Was he able to sell his property at least, or was he tempted to become a landlord once again?

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Landlord Nicholas Parrington discovers a couple are subletting his house, just months after a previous tenant had turned the property into a brothel, while investors in a community centre for children are aghast when squatters move into their building. In Lewisham, the council's Rogue Landlord Unit raids one of their main streets, on the lookout for slum conditions, illegal overcrowding and criminal activities

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than £5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over £6,000 owed by a property developer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Coventry, the sheriffs chase £10,000 owed by a publican to a contractor. The property appears to be empty, but after finding an ingenious method of entry, Matt and Garry are confronted by a surprised and angry landlord. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to central London to try to recover almost £8,000 owed by a former peer of the realm to a firm of accountants

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary about disputes between neighbours continues with single mum Amy, whose new life in Dorset turned sour when neighbour Rebecca betrayed her

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. After moving into a his new home, ex-paratrooper Tim finds himself dragged into an unexpected battle with his new neighbours

programme.title: When Kim Met Kanye: True Love or Big Business?
programme.desc: The story of how the reality star Kim Kardashian and rapper Kanye West became one of the most famous power-couples in the world. The couple married in a lavish ceremony in Italy in 2014, and have three children together, with all aspects of their lives played out in front to audiences on the reality television show, Keeping Up with the Kardashians

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary examining the case against Luke Mitchell, who was accused of brutally murdering 14-year-old schoolgirl Jodi Jones in 2003. 17 years on from her murder, two former detectives who are now private investigators re-open the case files and re-examine the police and prosecution's case against Luke Mitchell, who continues to maintain his innocence to this day. Throughout the programme, the investigators uncover shocking details of other male DNA found at the crime scene, and disturbing new information from a witness living in the area at the time

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town
programme.desc: The re-examination of the case against Luke Mitchell unearths shocking revelations about two males who were identified by eyewitnesses at the scene where Jodi was murdered. The conduct of the police while interviewing Mitchell as a 14-year-old is called into question, and Luke and his mother Corinne take a lie-detector test

programme.desc: Susan and Charles make a mysterious discovery in the park, and the investigation into Anthony's disappearance is reopened after two years

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Two known offenders end up in trouble again after a high-speed chase. An encounter with a gang of hoodies leads to a close shave for one officer, another goes in pursuit of a four-legged fugitive, and a Lamborghini turns out to be not all it seems

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: An officer is nearly run over by a desperate driver, and another's patience is tested by a drunken motorist. Plus, a law enforcer goes in search of a suspicious character, and a group of youths tries to deceive the interception unit

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Property developer Alex calls in an eviction specialist after finding that he could be arrested if he tries to oust squatters from the derelict pub he has recently purchased. Peterborough Council receives a complaint from a family threatened with an illegal eviction and violence by a letting agent. A woman regrets letting her flat to a mother and daughter after trouble with late rent payments turned into a nightmare

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A helicopter is used in the pursuit of an armed robber, ending in a serious accident. A sniffer dog makes a discovery, a fraudster is taken into custody and a gang of lorry thieves is pursued in a major manhunt. Plus, new recruits at South Yorkshire's Road Crime Unit are put to the test by a pair of suspected burglars

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team closes in on a suspected petrol thief, stops a motorist with a stash of suspicious goods in his boot, and tracks a motorist who heads to the fair after ditching his car. The police also have an appointment with a drink-driver who crashed into a doctor's surgery, and the owner of an uninsured car tests the officers' patience to the limit

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A driver mounts pavements, bumps into cars and collides with an ambulance as he tries to escape officers during a chase through the streets of Ripley in Derbyshire. An out-of-control car crashes into an interceptor's vehicle, and a helicopter is called in when a driver tries to lose his pursuers by taking the chase off-road

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. In east London they face a race against time to recover more than £8,000 from an electrical services company, and in Cheshire the enforcement agents chase nearly £4,000 of debt owed by a mobile phone shop

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An evasive man in west London is given a choice between paying up or relinquishing his luxury car, there's a writ for the organiser of a music festival, an aggressive rent defaulter needs evicting, and an entire hole family is angered in Hertfordshire when the agents call to collect a loan owed to a woman's ex-partner

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Mitch are on the trail of £2,500 in unpaid parking tickets in Cardiff, and while the debtor is not at home, they notice his car is sporting false number plates and call the police. The duo also face an angry defendant in Swindon when trying to collect £2,000 for unpaid rent on a lock-up, while in Buckinghamshire, Matt and Garry consider seizing a haul of luxury watches to pay more than £16,000 owed to a landlord

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Levi reports Kyle to the council, and there are arguments all around for the Cannings. Shane's attempts to impress Amy do not work out too well, and only fuel her insecurities

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Nikau returns from New Zealand, with Colby in solitary confinement, Bella is desperate to know what happened, and Ryder runs Salt for the day

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: The documentary about the fight to find a parking space focuses on the increasing use of technology. The West Midlands traffic police are assisted by Robocop, showing motorists how to park safely, and mum-of-four Davida meets the robots as she puts the UK's largest fully automated car park to the test

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at some of the most terrifying disasters in recent history, from horrifying dramas at sea to one of the worst air disasters in British aviation history, using eye witness testimony and footage taken by those involved telling the human stories behind the events. A cruise ship sailing off the coast of Norway is caught in a dangerous storm, and a passenger witnesses the casing of an airplane engine being ripped off mid-flight

programme.title: Mummy's Little Murderer
programme.desc: On May 7, 2011, 20-year-old Elliot Turner strangled his girlfriend Emily Longley and persuaded his doting parents to help him cover up the crime. This documentary examines events surrounding the murder, the investigation and the trial, and features interviews with family, friends, police and prosecutors, as well as covert recordings, surveillance footage and personal archive material

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of American serial killer Dennis Rader, who was convicted in 2005 of murdering 10 people between 1974 and 1991. He became known as the 'BTK killer' after he offered it as a suggestion in a series of taunting letters to police and media - the letters standing for 'blind, torture, kill'. Through his own extraordinary testimony, the programme uncovers how this church deacon and scout leader led a double life as a sexual sadist and killer

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Security guards in West Orchards shopping centre in Coventry try to tackle the issue of serial shoplifters, who are behind around 70% of all the thefts in the centre. Meanwhile at Weston Favell Shopping Centre in Northampton, the security team have their eye on a duo suspected of repeatedly shoplifting using young children as decoys

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: Documentary following people who engage in BDSM acts during lockdown

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the secret of the supermarket chain's success. The programme examines the launch of a brand of organic food from Prince Charles' own duchy and reveals how the opening of a new Waitrose store has been known to boost house prices in the surrounding area. A taste test is performed to see how Waitrose's own brands compare to their rivals

programme.title: M&S vs Waitrose: Which Is Better Value?
programme.desc: Documentary examining the ongoing rivalry between the supermarkets. Marks & Spencer has always had a special place in the nation's heart, with almost 1,000 stores and a reputation for quality stretching back 135 years. But Waitrose has proved a fierce rival. However, both stores face tough challenges in the future, not least from online retailers. Which of the two is best equipped to weather the high-street storm?

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Levi reports Kyle to the council, and there are arguments all around for the Cannings. Shane's attempts to impress Amy do not work out too well, and only fuel her insecurities

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Nikau returns from New Zealand, with Colby in solitary confinement, Bella is desperate to know what happened, and Ryder runs Salt for the day

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Columbo: A Stitch in Crime (1973)
programme.desc: Surgeon Barry Mayfield decides he needs get rid of his colleague to speed along a research project. When his partner requires heart surgery, Mayfield performs the operation himself and discreetly arranges some fatal complications. However, when he also murders a nurse who suspects the truth, he attracts the attention of the slovenly sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leonard Nimoy and Will Geer

programme.title: Columbo: Murder, Smoke and Shadows (1989)
programme.desc: An ambitious Hollywood director is visited by an old friend, who threatens to expose evidence of his involvement in the death of an actor. The film-maker resorts to murder to keep his dark secret safe, only to end up on the receiving end of Columbo's distinctive brand of interrogation. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan

programme.title: Columbo: Prescription Murder (1968)
programme.desc: A psychiatrist having an affair with a patient murders his wife with his lover's help. However, while he establishes the perfect alibi he soon finds himself pursued by Columbo, whose meandering investigative approach conceals an uncanny gift for detection. First episode of the detective series, starring Peter Falk and Gene Barry

programme.title: Columbo: Murder in Malibu (1990)
programme.desc: A wealthy romantic novelist realises her lover is only marrying her for her money and calls off their wedding - only to be subsequently murdered. The fiance is quickly cleared of all suspicion, but Columbo remains sure of his guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Andrew Stevens, Brenda Vaccaro and Laurie Walters

programme.title: Columbo: Murder Under Glass (1978)
programme.desc: The crumpled detective applies his well-honed instincts to a case of blackmail and murder in the world of haute cuisine when a restaurant owner is found dead after throwing a renowned food critic off his premises. Crime drama from The Silence of the Lambs director Jonathan Demme, starring Peter Falk, Louis Jourdan, Shera Danese and Richard Dysart

programme.title: Columbo: The Bye-Bye Sky-High IQ Murder Case (1977)
programme.desc: An accountant who has a reputation as being one of the brightest men in the world realises he has to kill a fellow genius to cover up his illegal activities. He puts his remarkable intelligence to the task of covering up every possible clue that could lead back to him - but has not counted on the equally sharp mind of slovenly sleuth Columbo. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and Theodore Bikel

programme.title: Columbo: Dead Weight (1971)
programme.desc: The dishevelled detective suspects a highly respected general is guilty of murdering an associate who was about to expose the war hero's shady business dealings, but Columbo has a hard time backing up his hunch with evidence because of the lack of a body or a weapon. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Eddie Albert, Suzanne Pleshette and John Kerr

programme.title: Columbo: Dagger of the Mind (1972)
programme.desc: A London theatre producer discovers his actress wife is having an affair with her co-star in their latest production. To avoid exposure, the pair murder him and make it look as if his death was an accident. Meanwhile, Columbo is in the city to pick up some tips from Scotland Yard, and sets about uncovering the truth. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Honor Blackman, Richard Basehart and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and her team participate in a city-wide operation to close in on people charged with exploiting underage Catholic schoolchildren, with judges, legislators, lawyers and even members of the NYPD all inplicated in the scandal. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Halstead is forced to choose between loyalty to his unit or his girlfriend Camila after their partying unintentionally puts him in the middle of a drug operation and a murder of an undercover DEA agent. Meanwhile, Voight finally discovers the mole in his unit. Drama, starring Jesse Lee Soffer

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: The CPD team are called in when a victim of an initiation is discovered in a warehouse, and a bracelet found at the scene leads them to another girl who managed to escape

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a series of mysterious deaths in which people simply exploded, and discover it may be the consequence of a centuries-long feud. Elsewhere, Monroe and Rosalee talk about moving their relationship a stage further. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When Nick and Hank investigate a drowning death with mysterious marks on the victim's ankles, they happen upon a group of water-bound Wesen. Meanwhile, Rosalee starts unpacking her things at Monroe's, and Captain Renard makes a startling realisation about the possible identities of the royal baby's parents

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Assistant coroner Palmer is called to the building site on a Navy base where a body has been found. While looking into the incident, he spots an armed man fleeing the scene with the victim's passport and is almost killed as he gives chase. It appears the document was stolen to hinder the investigation, but the discovery of a second corpse reveals a case of stolen identity and a compensation racket

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part story, the entire team is put in danger while hunting for the killer of a former NCIS agent. Jenny Shepard calls in Mike Franks for help, afraid she too is a target - and convinced Gibbs will be next. American crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A politician is embroiled in a triple murder, but persuading him to reveal the truth is only the first step toward unmasking a killer willing to go to any lengths to avoid capture. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into a hit-and-run leads to a property scam, but Green, Rubirosa and Lupo's undercover work takes a surprising twist that pits McCoy against the US Attorney's office. January Jones (Mad Men) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A tennis star is attacked in her locker room before a big tournament, and her wrist is broken during the incident. The sportswoman cannot give a description of her assailant, but the circumstances of the fray lead the detectives to suspect one of her competitors. Chris Noth stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A legal-aid strike leads first to murder, and then to Rubirosa pitting her wits against Cutter as the ADA tries to bring a case against a pro golfer accused of the killing of a paralegal. American legal drama, starring Alana De La Garza and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the world of online romance when a garage mechanic is murdered, but the case takes a series of bizarre turns before they are able to identify the killer. Police drama, starring Anthony Anderson and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a drug addict is discovered in the yard of a daycare centre, and evidence reveals she was the heiress to the fortune. However, suspicions are raised when the family's lawyer gets power of attorney over the trust fund. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Vance sticks rigidly to the rules as he investigates the death of a fellow agent, but Gibbs and Franks take matters into their own hands to catch the killers. The case also leads to major changes for the agency. Drama, starring Rocky Carroll, Mark Harmon and Muse Watson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs discovers a link between the murder of a petty officer and the break-up of his team, leading him and new director Leon Vance to uncover a case of blackmail involving an NCIS agent. The duo single out three suspects, but learn vital information has been stolen, and realise the whole Persian Gulf Fleet could be in danger

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A lieutenant apparently commits suicide by jumping from an aircraft carrier and Ziva and McGee are dispatched to inform the widow - but arrive to find that she has been killed. Subsequent inquiries reveal that the injuries on her body were inflicted after death and the murder scene was carefully staged to mislead investigators. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After NCIS arrives at a Halloween crime scene, Torres recognises the victim as a former friend from federal law enforcement training. Meanwhile, Jimmy thinks his lab may be haunted. Mark Harmon, Sean Murray and Brian Dietzen star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The Bakers, the stars of America's top reality TV show, are rocked by scandal when 13-year-old daughter Lane is discovered to be three months pregnant. Ultra-conservative parents Pam and Frank resist SVU involvement in a misguided attempt to shield their 10 children - and their lucrative TV empire - from disgrace. However, when Lane accuses one of the show's cameramen of raping her, one who happens to have already had a vasectomy, it becomes clear the Bakers are trying to protect someone. Unable to aid in the inquiry due to her own pregnancy, Rollins decides to make good use of her time away from the beat to binge-watch the Bakers' show in an effort to identify potential suspects. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing teenage girl takes an emotional toll on Sgt Dodds, and DNA evidence becomes the crucial link the team needs to identify the youngster's abductor. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank battle a powerful Wesen who has become a vigilante carrying out deadly punishments for human criminals. Meanwhile, Juliette learns the truth about Nick's mother, and Adalind has an ultrasound with unusual results

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A priest is murdered by a boy he is performing an exorcism on. Nick and Hank investigate the case, which leads them to the Wesen Council. Meanwhile, Renard leaves town to deal with the situation in Europe

programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads Green and Lupo to suspect an innocent doctor has been murdered in place of a killer's true target, a physician who administered a botched lethal injection in South Carolina. Police drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a woman dies in a hospital emergency room, Briscoe and Logan investigate a doctor's unorthodox method of treating cancer, which McCoy intends to prove is negligent homicide. Sam Waterston joins the cast

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman lies in a coma after being found with a bullet in her head, leaving Briscoe and Logan to investigate whether her abusive husband is responsible for shooting her. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A jeweller's murder is linked to a prostitution business, and the subsequent trial puts McCoy's job on the line as interested parties try to call in old favours. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Bernard and Lupo investigate when a stockbroker admitted to hospital dies on the operating table from severe internal bleeding. When the case reaches court, McCoy is forced to make one of the most controversial arguments of his career and his path crosses with ADA Cutter

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An abortion clinic doctor is murdered, and when Logan and Briscoe investigate, they begin to suspect members of a radical movement led by a former priest, who appears to have no sympathy for the man's fate. Starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs receives a call from his old friend Senator Patrick Kiley, who claims he is being framed for the murder of a naval commander, and seeks help to clear his name. However, incriminating evidence quickly piles up against him - and a second death complicates matters further. Meanwhile, Ziva lets her hair down to obtain fingerprints from a big oil lobbyist. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs revisits his home town to investigate an assault that left one marine dead and another badly injured, and enlists the help of his estranged father to identify the assailant. Suspicion initially falls on a local man whose daughter was dating the survivor of the attack - but later inquiries uncover a tangled tale of uncertain paternity and forbidden love. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Ralph Waite

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine is found murdered in his garage, and inquiries lead the agents to his former sergeant. However, Gibbs and the team soon find out that their man is under FBI witness protection as he is about to testify against a mobster, giving him a cast-iron alibi. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Joe Spano

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The patriarch of a wealthy family is beaten to death with a hockey stick, and there are a number of possible suspects. The list includes the man's estranged wife, his son, and even the children's nanny, but they seem to have as many alibis as they do motives. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: One of the NYPD's own is implicated in a cover-up, and the SVU tries to unravel a complex sex trafficking operation with roots in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson hopes justice will be served as child abductor Lewis Hodda goes on trial. However, when a plea deal is rejected, Barba must rely on decades-old evidence to make his case, and faces off against former SVU colleague Dr Huang. Crime drama, guest starring Tom Sizemore

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A high-school student succumbs to the flirtations of an attractive female teacher, and begins to plan a clandestine encounter. However, he quickly finds himself in a far more terrifying situation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank and Nick encounter an urban legend in the Portland sewers. Renard faces up to the recent assassination attempt on his life and Prince Viktor arrives in Europe to bring those responsible for the demise of his cousin Eric to justice. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli, Russell Hornsby and Sasha Roiz

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Dealer
programme.desc: Julian Rivett and his fiancee Charlotte want to double their £2,000 savings to pay for their dream honeymoon. Antiques expert Paul Martin embarks on a nationwide quest to buy, restore and sell a variety objects in the hope of making a healthy profit for the couple

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Roger and Obie Pearce want a slice of the Spanish good life. Obie has never been to Spain before, and Roger hasn't visited since he was in the army 40 years ago, but they are determined to relocate to Almeria where Roger's health could benefit from the warm climate. Ben Hillman sets out to find them their perfect home on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Customs UK

Plus, the crew of the fast cutter searcher investigates mysterious pot-markers off the Cornish coast

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: Customs officers at Bristol catch three passengers carrying 87kg of tobacco. Claiming the amount is for personal use they put up a fight when they learn they may not be allowed to keep it. The crew of the Searcher boards a yacht on the trail of drugs, and a sniffer dog picks up a scent at Gatwick that turns out to be cocaine. John Rand narrates

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: Off Cornwall, the crew of the fast cutter Searcher decides to board a lone yacht coming from the Canaries, a frequent transit point for cocaine. Officers in Dover detect a mysterious shadow in a truck full of chipboard, and in Bristol a man is caught carrying 5,000 cigarettes back from Turkey

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: In Dover, the specialist rummage team discovers a ton of cannabis hidden in a truck, and in Cornwall a ship's captain lies to officers of the cutter Searcher about the number of cigarettes he has on board. programme.title: Exploits at West Poley (1985)
programme.desc: Two boys exploring an underground cave divert the course of a river, with surprising repercussions for two towns. Children's period drama, with Brenda Fricker and Charlie Condou

programme.title: Girl in the Headlines (1963)
programme.desc: An inspector investigating the murder of a fashion model is led straight into the lair of an international drug-smuggling ring. Crime drama, starring Ian Hendry, Ronald Fraser, Jeremy Brett, Margaret Johnston and Natasha Perry

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: A Matter of Choice (1963)
programme.desc: A married woman finds herself caught in a moral dilemma when children inadvertently cause the death of her diabetic lover. Drama, starring Anthony Steel, Jeanne Moody and Ballard Berkeley

programme.title: The Likely Lads (1976)
programme.desc: Bob and Thelma embark on a chaotic caravan holiday - with best pal Terry and a glamorous Scandinavian au pair in tow, ensuring that nothing will go according to plan. Comedy based on the TV series, starring James Bolam, Rodney Bewes, Brigit Forsyth and Mary Tamm

programme.title: Capital Conversation

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by fellow musicians for an impromptu jam session, as well as a chat about their lives in rock. In this edition he is joined by Alice Cooper

programme.title: No Stranger Than Love (2015)
programme.desc: A married woman has an affair with a co-worker, only for him to be sucked into a mysterious hole that suddenly appears in her home. She has to find a way to get him out of this strange imprisonment without anyone learning about their secret relationship. Sci-fi romantic comedy, starring Alison Brie and Justin Chatwin

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken (2015)
programme.desc: Five men struggling to make ends meet decide to kidnap a beer tycoon who is one of Europe's richest men. The plan is a success, and they demand the biggest ransom in history - but tensions within the group threaten their chances of escaping the law. Fact-based crime drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Jim Sturgess and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Queen of the Blues (1979)
programme.desc: Two brothers buy a failing Soho nightclub and hope to turn its fortunes around - but they end up being threatened by gangsters demanding protection money. Fortunately, salvation is at hand in an enthusiastic stripper, who comes up with a plan to save the day. Drama, starring Mary Millington and Rosemary England

programme.title: The Starving Games (2013)
programme.desc: A futuristic society challenges teenagers from impoverished communities to fight to the death for food. A girl is persuaded to take her sister's place in the games, but is unprepared for the bizarre selection of characters waiting for her. Spoof of The Hunger Games, starring Maiara Walsh and Brant Daugherty

programme.desc: Dermot offers his body and Gary fixes up a burglar alarm in forlorn efforts to impress Deborah

Ealing comedy, with Paul Douglas, Alex Mackenzie, James Copeland and Tommy Kearins

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, where consultant surgeon Shaw Somers, dietitian Lucy Jones and GP Giovanni Miletto are among specialists aiming to discover if tailored nutritional programmes can help. Among those in need of assistance are a 24-year-old woman suffering from polycystic ovary syndrome, and a 44-year-old single father battling type 2 diabetes. Pixie McKenna also investigates the truth about superfoods and the programme features an experiment to see if chocolate can help combat high blood pressure

programme.desc: Two British soldiers escape from German prison camps and hide out in a fishing village in occupied France. Second World War drama based on Rupert Croft-Cooke's novel, starring Stephen Boyd and James Robertson Justice

programme.desc: A sex-obsessed journalist whose career is falling apart has a chance encounter in a bar with a high-class prostitute. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. A trip to Hong Kong organised by her parents opens her eyes to more experiences - both good and bad. Australian drama, starring Glory Annen and Jody Hanson

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.desc: The Princess Elizabeth Cup sees troopers compete to be the smartest in the Household Cavalry. Recruits seeking promotion attend gruelling tests involving live rounds and grenades, and the trainee horse-riders attempt their first canter

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.desc: Everton v Southampton (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight clash from Goodison Park, as the teams meet for the second time in this campaign. programme.title: Live MNF
programme.desc: Everton v Southampton (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight clash from Goodison Park, as the teams meet for the second time in this campaign. The reverse fixture took place last October and on that occasion it was The Saints who came out on top, with James Ward-Prowse and Che Adams scoring one goal apiece in a 2-0 victory at St Mary's Stadium. When the teams met here last they produced a 1-1 draw, which has been the final score on three of the last four meetings at Goodison Park

programme.title: World Darts Championship
programme.desc: The afternoon session on day nine of this year's tournament. This stage last year saw Fallon Sherrock shock the darts world with a 3-1 win over Austrian Mensur Suljovic in the second round. That win was Sherrock's second victory in the tournament, after her history-making win over Ted Evetts. Other winners at this stage last year were Australia's Simon Whitlock, and Englishmen Adrian Lewis, Daryl Gurney and Glen Durrant
